channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin's dwindling exchange reserves don't pack the same bullish punch anymore
item.description: Santiment reported that bitcoin supply is at its lowest since 2017 and ether since 2015, adding that it doesn’t guarantee prices will move higher but helps set up crypto’s next bull cycle.

item.title: Regulators invited Binance to seek new licenses after MiCA setback, co-CEO says
item.description: Binance is exploring new licensing paths into Europe while continuing to expand its regulatory footprint in Asia, says co-CEO Richard Teng.

item.title: Russia's largest private bank Alfa-Bank tests crypto trading
item.description: Alfa-Bank is testing cryptocurrency trading for qualified investors as Russia moves toward regulating digital assets and banks prepare new crypto services.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin ETFs slip back to outflows while ether funds extend their streak
item.description: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs lost a net $84 million on Wednesday, ending a three-day inflow run that had pulled in roughly $509 million

item.title: Bank of Japan may speed up rate hikes, pushing borrowing costs above 2%, ex-BOJ official warns
item.description: Former BOJ official issues interest-rate warning as yen continues to slide against the dollar.

item.title: 'CASHCAT' trader turns $800 into over $1 million on Robinhood's brand new blockchain
item.description: Robinhood's blockchain went live on July 1 to move stocks onchain. Its first breakout hit is a memecoin named after the mascot the company abandoned.

item.title: Wyden urges Senate leaders to keep dev protections in crypto bill
item.description: Senator Ron Wyden has called on Senate leaders to ensure the Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act remains in the CLARITY Act when it is brought to the floor.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Trader loses $1M after signing phishing token approval
item.description: Onchain scammers netted more than $14 billion last year, and approval phishing remains a primary attack vector.

item.title: AI is shortening the shelf life of crypto security audits, researchers warn
item.description: Hackers have also been exploiting the codebases of defunct decentralized finance protocols, draining millions of dollars in customer funds.

item.title: XRP holds near $1.10 as traders watch long-term breakout setup
item.description: XRP defended the $1.00-$1.05 support zone, but the near-term chart remains capped below resistance as analysts track larger wedge and channel patterns.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether steady, gold slides as U.S.-Iran tensions escalate again
item.description: Oil climbed for a third day and gold fell for a fourth while bitcoin is up 1.6% on the week.

item.title: AI boom fuels inflation fears, complicating Fed’s next rate move
item.description: Ongoing strong demand for AI infrastructure “would likely sustain upward pressure on prices for technology products and electricity,” Federal Reserve policymakers said.

item.title: Crypto VC Paradigm raises $1.2B to push into AI
item.description: Crypto venture firm Paradigm is widening its investment gaze toward AI and other frontier industries with its latest fund.

item.title: Mark Cuban-backed DeFi dashboard Zapper shutters after 7 years
item.description: Zapper provided crypto market data to over 2 million monthly active users and oversaw more than $13 billion in processed transactions during its peak.

item.title: Crypto could benefit if Fed steps in to backstop US stock market: Analysts
item.description: The size and scope of the US stock market “gives policymakers a strong incentive to backstop major drawdowns,” said Bitget Wallet COO, Alvin Kan.

item.title: The New Grok 4.5 Is Out. Elon Musk Says It Competes With Last Year's Claude Opus
item.description: SpaceXAI's new coding model is cheaper and faster than Anthropic and OpenAI's flagships—and by Musk's own account, at least one generation behind them.

item.title: Bitcoin tumbles back to key $60K support level: What’s behind the sell pressure?
item.description: Bitcoin faces renewed sell pressure amid an oil price surge, Japan economic contagion risks and a fresh round of selling from Strategy.

item.title: The Robinhood Chain > Ethereum secures it > Arbitrum powers it > Robinhood brings millions onchain The next chapter of finance is programmable - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE83M1JXQy12NS1HOHZtczU4YnF3ZmwtenBEcnB2dUQyNXVHc0tXZ3JfTHFoNU4zaFF1MlVvcmNGS01Nb0F0WWMyLVlmeEhlSDhWYmw4OEJ0MG0tVHZrbXc?oc=5" target="_blank">The Robinhood Chain > Ethereum secures …

item.title: #Bitcoin didn't lose its bullish divergence. The indication is that it's looking likely that we're going to be continuing the upwards trend, even though the markets have witnessed a small correction. The bullish divergence is still applicable even though there's the p - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBKVE53WmRMaGs4MDgwT1l3Zms5T0NhYzNudmdaVnZ6Qm9VWVZsYkpjblE0NzliLUpvVGlQNlUzczJTZ1daMHFVemRDeVNpNTlTNVhzX3RLTjgxTDBqNUVQY3pRbw?oc=5" target="_blank">#Bitcoin didn't lose its bullish…

item.title: Paradigm Raises $1.2 Billion Fund as Crypto VC Pushes Further Into AI
item.description: The investment firm said its fourth fund will back AI, robotics, and crypto startups as it broadens beyond digital assets.

item.title: Tokenized stock transfers surge 105% in a month to $8.4B
item.description: Industry data shows trading activity and market value accelerating as crypto companies and traditional financial institutions expand tokenized equity initiatives.

item.title: TLDR; Solana is the spot market for crypto assets, RWAs, stablecoins, tokenized equities, and memes - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1NMFBGbTZzdlAybHpWYUt6U1JSc0VQYm5oNU1aTERXVFpOVTM1LXhLVHgzeXdFT1JhNnhwZlVDN1p1RVNGTzB0cG5iSTl3a3Uydm8tcnZyMFZNeWs?oc=5" target="_blank">TLDR; Solana is the spot market for crypto …

item.title: Bitcoin Stalls as Ethereum Flashes Worst Weekly Signal in Years: Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin is looking slightly more optimistic but failed the breakout everyone was watching. Meanwhile, ETH just printed a weekly death cross for the first time in years.

item.title: Officials set to revise MiCA to cover non-EU stablecoin issuers: Report
item.description: EU officials reportedly plan to consider changes to the Markets in Crypto-Assets framework, dubbed by some as “MiCA 2.0,” in response to a US stablecoin law and rules on tokenized payments and deposits.

item.title: Bitcoin peels back to $62K as Fed-wary futures traders cut risk: Is the BTC rally over?
item.description: Bitcoin hovered around the $62,000 mark following a spike in oil prices, escalating hot war in Iran and traders’ move to cut risk ahead of a Federal Reserve policy statement.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs 'Turning a Corner' After Record Bleed Hits $8 Billion
item.description: Investors had backed away from Bitcoin since mid-May.

item.title: BTC Breakeven ARR tends to break brains, and I think it is important to understand why. There are three broad Bitcoin views: 1. Bullish Bitcoin (Amplified Bitcoin) These investors believe Bitcoin will appreciate significantly. If they can borrow long duration capit - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE1oOG5WbG9fVVlQLWxzNTlmSWxib0R1bU5id0gwQ3Zac2lpakhQMVFpQk1JemZudWxkbnZlWVE5XzhMM1lXbENrLXota0QtajJoaWJMT3dPT1NLYVlJQXlLdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BTC Breakeven ARR tends to break bra…

item.title: Adam Back’s Bitcoin treasury company seeks new terms with Cantor for SPAC merger
item.description: The Bitcoin Standard Treasury Company and Cantor Equity Partners I announced that they were looking into amending the terms of a 2025 merger deal that “better reflected market conditions.”

item.title: Stablecoin-settled TradFi perpetual trading tops $1.1T: Binance Research
item.description: A new Binance Research report said stablecoins are fast becoming a preferred settlement layer for tokenized TradFi markets while gaining traction in payments and savings.

item.title: Bank of England governor denies Farage lobbying swayed CBDC policy: Report
item.description: Andrew Bailey reportedly said Bank of England policy remained independent after a meeting with Nigel Farage that included discussions on cryptocurrency.

item.title: Lucky Trader Turns $85 Into $2 Million on Robinhood Chain Meme Coin
item.description: The meme coin CashCat on Robinhood Chain is the latest flavor of the hour, and one trader has turned a mini-investment into a small fortune in less than three weeks.

item.title: BNB Chain Plans New Layer-1 for AI Agents and Quantum Future
item.description: The network’s 2026 roadmap targets faster transactions, AI-powered apps, and infrastructure aimed at competing with traditional financial systems, while preparing for a quantum future.

item.title: XRP Logo Lands on Kansas Jayhawks Jerseys as Ripple Inks Multi-Year Deal
item.description: Ripple and XRP become the latest crypto brands to enter the sports marketing space.

item.title: After a decade of blockspace fears and non-monetary-use panics, Bitcoin still has no spam problem. Fees are 1 sat/vB: anyone can move any amount globally with immediate processing for ~$0.30. The free market has always solved Bitcoin’s blockspace chall - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9yeHZQYmxOQ1prMEFYd3JmMkdza1VBNjB3ZzViaE9VdjZmclZVcVZwSVl3RVFZS2dzYlFuX1Q0WGlGOUJsX3kwanV6a2hqZEc0TlZBSV9tLWJNd3c?oc=5" target="_blank">After a decade of blockspace fears and non-…

item.title: Polymarket bets on U.S. marketing blitz to win back trust after 4-year ban: Report
item.description: The prediction market's head of U.S. operations says the business is taking steps to legitimize itself after years of legal scrutiny.

item.title: Malaysia Seizes Over 75,000 Crypto Mining Rigs in Power-Theft Crackdown
item.description: More than 3,000 raids since 2022 have led to 629 arrests, as authorities target miners siphoning electricity from the national grid.

item.title: Bitcoin slides as Iran ceasefire collapse sees $75 oil on Hormuz blockade threats
item.description: Bitcoin price pressure took BTC toward the "crucial" $61,000 mark as oil prices soared on the collapse of the US-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: With MSTR concerns assuaged, look to traditional signals around BTC
item.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, FalconX’s Gaspar Martin writes that BTC is reaching a market bottom and is poised for a turnaround.

item.title: Crypto VC Paradigm launches $1.2 billion AI fund as it broadens beyond digital assets
item.description: The firm's latest fund backs AI and robotics startups but leadership says it remains committed to crypto investing.

item.title: Paradigm’s 4th fund $1.2B to invest and build in crypto, AI, robotics, and other areas of the technical frontier - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBqaHR4bzYzdWcxRDVwb3FVVW1FOXpGTTdJaG1vSlk3S21rV2NHV2VCTEljZC1RLW5TVUM1M3Y2YUxSdTNsMHd2MWwzU2loa3lTRFU3VTBtbTdIWGlhSmZj?oc=5" target="_blank">Paradigm’s 4th fund $1.2B to invest an…

item.title: Bottom Building in Progress Bitcoin remains in deep value after five months below key investor cost bases. LTH capitulation has peaked at $280M/day while ETF flows stay net negative. Derivatives lean cautiously long, but the options surface still prices downs - X

item.title: Kraken Wins $22M From Auditor That Abandoned It During Operation Choke Point 2.0
item.description: The crypto exchange says an arbitrator sided with it after accounting firm Mazars walked away from a nearly finished audit.

item.title: Ethereum is entering a new phase: Organizations focused on infrastructure, go-to-market, and more are launching to accelerate the growth of the coming institutional supercycle. Here is what just happened in this new Ethereum era, and how @Sharplink is hel - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFB6NnZoRHNqTXpZblpJNENmbmRDdWs3UndpWmd2MUZmZ20zNW1qU3NfdGVBMkxIQS05dFpwakdnZHcxSlh5a0ZWa2F6YmpEQTE5SENCcW1mMjNvVEtydmJZ?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum is entering a new phase: Orga…

item.title: BLACKROCK IS BUYING BITCOIN BlackRock bought $250M Bitcoin in the past 2 days. They started buying Bitcoin after selling every single day for more than 2 weeks. How much will they buy this week? - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE8xLTJGVTlqWkVPR01Rc0ZBZjI5TjZkZEJOU0w0YTNrZk5vMWgxbi1HVGZyc0l2SlpFX2d6RmtvY2ZvQW13aEpvMS1kS1BJM2VwSTB0Q1RfckIyTW8?oc=5" target="_blank">BLACKROCK IS BUYING BITCOIN BlackRock bough…

item.title: Dinari, tZERO join forces on turnkey platform for tokenized U.S. equities
item.description: The move comes as firms race to build the infrastructure for blockchain-based stocks and debate how tokenized stocks should work.

item.title: Adam Back's bitcoin treasury firm scraps SPAC merger, seeks new deal
item.description: BSTR and Cantor Equity Partners will not complete their merger under the original July 2025 agreement, with the shareholder meeting postponed indefinitely.

item.title: BNB Chain is building a new layer-1 for high-frequency trading and AI agents
item.description: The network aims to process over 100,000 transactions per second by streaming them directly, eliminating public queues to make trades faster and more secure.

item.title: Bull Bitcoin asks French court to strike down DAC8 implementing decree
item.description: The non-custodial Bitcoin exchange petitioned to annul a French decree implementing DAC8, arguing the rules could create surveillance and physical risks for up to 135 million European crypto holders.

item.title: India crypto tax filings lag trading activity: Report
item.description: India’s tax department reportedly found that fewer than a quarter of the 645,000 people who made crypto transactions reported them on tax returns.

item.title: Morning Minute: Vanguard Hires 'Head of Digital Assets' in Crypto Capitulation
item.description: Crypto majors fall as the U.S. strikes Iran, ending the ceasefire. Vanguard opens its doors. And a meme coin frenzy erupts on Robinhood chain.

item.title: Citadel abandons multi-year crypto lawsuit to focus on bankruptcy order against an ex-employee
item.description: After winning a 6 million-pound London arbitration award, Citadel dropped its U.S. trade secrets case, saying another judgment would likely go uncollected.

item.title: SpaceX's first bitcoin wallet movements in six months likely don't signal sales
item.description: Onchain trackers found the newly public company shifted a tiny amount of bitcoin between its own addresses. Nothing reached an exchange.

item.title: Bankers Filed Suspicious Activity Report Over Farage's £5M Gift From Tether Billionaire
item.description: The report, filed in May 2024, invited the National Crime Agency to determine whether there were grounds for further investigation.

item.title: Bitcoin's inflation quagmire gets stickier as renewed MidEast conflict sends oil price soaring
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 8, 2026

item.title: Crypto and stocks tumble after Trump declares ceasefire 'over' following Iran strikes
item.description: Bitcoin fell, altcoins slid after Trump said the ceasefire with Iran is "over" as U.S. and Iran traded airstrikes.

item.title: Reserve Bank of India still favors crypto prohibition to curtail tax evasion: Reuters
item.description: Indian regulators maintained a hawkish stance despite the growing embrace of digital assets and technology by governments worldwide.

item.title: SPACEX JUST MOVED BITCOIN A tagged SpaceX address just moved Bitcoin for the first time in 6 months. SpaceX (15atF) made a test transaction of $88 of BTC to SpaceX (bc1q9). Is SpaceX about to move more BTC? - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE11N19MbXFNczU1RV9ubTRWeXFCamIxa1cxUVBjNWM0THdDRFNBYjFYLWM0ckZGUzdGUTkwcnpyODdJSjhJS0MtOHVWajdtbDlvV3loMnNxeEt2N2c?oc=5" target="_blank">SPACEX JUST MOVED BITCOIN A tagged SpaceX a…

item.title: Validators embrace XRP Ledger's recent upgrade. But not everyone’s on board yet
item.description: The new software leads among the network's validators, yet by node count it sits behind the older v3.1.3, and the security amendment bundled with it remains a separate, slower vote. The upgrade needs 80% of the trusted validator list to ac…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Bitcoin falls under $62,000 after President Trump says MoU with Iran is over. - X
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5mMUFNR2VmN1U5eXNmanJVTmdieExlUG40eVJ1M29mdEFtTVFjZHZkZVloRzhHU3lpVnFzak5HZHJiQmNFRFhLQlVXT0x1R0hWRVQyZzdpYzRLYUFScUhUNWZn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Bitcoin falls un…
